name: Anchor
visual_summary: An Anchor component is a clickable link within an application, used to navigate users to other pages or sections.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Anchor
Description: An Anchor component is a clickable link within an application, used to navigate users to other pages or sections.
Style: e.g. default, dark
Interactions: clickable
Tags: link, button, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Anchor/index.ts
export { Anchor } from './Anchor';

export type {
  AnchorProps,
  AnchorStylesNames,
  AnchorCssVariables,
  AnchorFactory,
  AnchorVariant,
} from './Anchor';
